tracks.rawText: 5:49Studio Selectionv5.5CoverFemale idol supervoice pop with pristine stacked harmonies, bright belted leads, and airy ad-libs, Clean rhythmic electric guitar, slap bass, and tight disco drums drive a neon-lit groove, Male tenor vocal sections contrast with glossy choir pads, vocal layering, pitch-corrected runs, sidechain synth bass, and sparkling delay tails1PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 3:28Many Rhytms One Sound [2313664106]UploadFunk-pop with disco influences, Features a clean, rhythmic electric guitar playing syncopated 16th-note scratches and palm-muted riffs, A prominent slap bass guitar follows the kick drum patterns, The drum kit uses a tight, dry snare and a consistent eighth-note hi-hat pattern, A bright, soulful male tenor vocal leads with frequent use of falsetto ad-libs, Occasional brass stabs and a subtle synth pad provide harmonic depth, The tempo is 118 BPM in the key of G major, The arrangement features a breakdown with a wah-wah guitar solo and a rhythmic bridge focusing on the bass and percussion2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Many Rhytms One Sound [2313664106]

tracks.rawText: 3:27PROJECT OBSIDIANv5.5CoverPsytrance at 145 BPM with arpeggiated supersaw leads, resonant acid bass, punchy four-on-the-floor kick, and crisp offbeat hats, Stumbling then steady rhythm via syncopated percussion glitches, delay-timed synth echoes, filter automation, wide stereo pads, and a driving rolling groove that locks in over time1PublishRemix
tracks.title: PROJECT OBSIDIAN
